use_cases: Primary call-to-action triggers in forms and dashboards
Navigation actions between pages or views
Destructive actions like delete or cancel operations
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and tooltips
Ghost-style buttons for secondary actions and menus
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Supports asChild prop for composition with other components. Standard focus and hover states included via Tailwind utilities, making it suitable as a foundational UI element across any SaaS, e-commerce, or application context.
